/prevent.help Mar 19, 2008 CONTENTS Coverity Prevent Coverity Prevent ---------------- Coverity Prevent is a C, C++ and Java debugger from http://www.coverity.com. There is a

bugger from http://www.coverity.com. There is a standalone version and an Eclipse plugin for the Java product. The standalone analysis can run in batch mode and do more in-depth checking that the plugin. Academic licenses were obtained by Pr

e plugin. Academic licenses were obtained by Prof Clancy in July 2007. These licenses are gratis but are explicitly prohibited for use in research projects. It is also prohibited to publish any benchmarks that compare this with other debug

ny benchmarks that compare this with other debuggers. Coverity Prevent is installed in /usr/sww/pkg/prevent on the EECS Solaris (SPARC and X86) systems. There is user documentation under /usr/sww/pkg/prevent/doc https://inst.eecs.be
/usr/sww/pkg/prevent/doc https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst/pub/ EECS Instructional Support 378/384/386 Cory Hall, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
